name: Arkansas Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Take cottage cheese and cream in blender until very smooth. Set aside.
2. Put egg yolk in top of double boiler and beat well, adding milk.
3. Add gelatin and salt to the mixture from step 2.
4. Cook over boiling water until the gelatin dissolves and the mixture thickens (about 10 minutes). Remove from heat.
5. Add sugar substitute to the cooled mixture.
6. Add cottage cheese, lemon juice, and vanilla to the cooled mixture. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon.
7. Beat egg white until stiff.
8. Fold the beaten egg white and Lite Coolwhip together into the chilled mixture.
9. Pour the batter into a graham crust or into a pie plate. Top with crumb topping (crush 2 graham crackers fine, mix with a pinch of cinnamon and nutmeg).
